You are the ultimate authoritarian who shut down restaurants and masked our kids while you

It’s time we reigned in CARB.  Stop the gas taxes and make

We ended authoritarianism here.  No one voted to ban gas cars.  Your elected legislature didn’t pass a bill to do this.  One man @GavinNewsom decided he knew what was best for you and ordered it to be done by edict.  We rejected that philosophy in 1776. Gavin got slapped down

The Senate just staged an intervention. Let’s be honest, California needed it. Newsom’s gas car ban was never about the planet. It was about control. You like your car? Too bad. Can’t afford a new one? Sucks for you. Grid overloaded? Not his problem. This wasn’t climate policy.

Good morning CA: another gas refinery is closing and our prices will shoot up even more! Totally predictable and you can thank @GavinNewsom and the Democratic politicians for their flawed policies. https://t.co/4Lu9NEKc9E

As Bernie Sanders and AOC stop off in Folsom today please keep this in mind: We have adopted all of their policies in California. How’s that working out for you? 

We have the highest cost of living, the most poverty, the most homeless, second highest gas prices, housing costs

Smoke and mirrors. Here is your one-time annual $137 credit that you can apply to your $600 monthly gas & electricity bill! 

He is hoping that you are stupid.  That a pittance “credit” will make you forget that HIS policies have driven our utility bills through the roof, that

I heard @realDonaldTrump loud and clear.  Eliminate the permits, the regulations and fast track the rebuilding. Start managing the forest and our land. Maximize our water.  The President is here to help, now let’s get out of our own way.

This is a pretty sick political maneuver. Tying a wildfire recovery bill to a political stunt to help Gavin with Democratic primary voters?  

Just another day in Sacramento. The irony is that this kind of virtue signaling politics is exactly why we are in this mess. https://t.co/1Ffw2277T6

At a time when California should be laser focused on responding to the devastating wildfires in LA, Democrat lawmakers’ priority is creating a $50 million slush fund to hire government lawyers for hypothetical fights against the federal government and to defend criminal illegal

Dear @realDonaldTrump, as the representative of Paradise that was burned by wildfire, a strong voice for land managment, and as a leader of the @AsmRepublicans in California I would love to offer you my own invite to California to review the real policy problems that lead to

It’s @GavinNewsom hands down. 

Is it really even close?  

Although I did love the comment: “Justin Trudeau, before he resigned.” Lol.
I mean the pure audacity to say these tax increases aren’t a big deal because we get so much benefit from them… Our roads?  Dude has no clue.

"It often feels like there are two separate states in California…” Gallagher said. 

“I think we might need to look into it. Maybe there should be two states."

What say you? 

https://t.co/o7CknEyrJA
He’s literally built nothing…

Gavin Newsom is coming to Colusa today. Here’s what he needs to know:

1. His buddies at PG&E and the PUC have more than doubled electricity rates since he took office, 4 increases in the last year alone, having huge implications for agriculture and rural residents. 

2. Sites
We desperately need a Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E.) in California

We will introduce a bill immediately to rescind this action and we will bring it to a vote with all Republicans voting yes. The Democrats will have the opportunity to show if they are with the People or not.  And the People must hold them accountable.
Don’t blame CARB for this additional gas tax increase. Blame @GavinNewsom and the Democrats in the Legislature who have empowered them.  This is their work.

I also note that @GavinNewsom special session announcement says NOTHING about addressing our insurance crisis or anything to address the sky high cost of living that is crushing California families. 

Totally tone deaf.
Look at San Francisco and tell me you want San Francisco politicians running the nation.

Can any franchisee get an exemption from the $20 minimum wage law or do they need to donate more than $150k to Newsom first? 

This crooked deal needs to be investigated. 
 https://t.co/ieAt8FZ68i
Honestly with the amount of crime Gavin Newsom and the Democrats have enabled here in CA you need a gun to protect yourself.  That’s the sad reality.

So it’s now official.  The Governor has called a special session to raise gas taxes even more and increase regulations that are already strangling our supply of gas in California.  You can’t make this up.
Only in California would someone propose to increase taxes as a solution to lowering gas prices.
Absolutely no one is leaving Florida to come to California, in fact quite the opposite.
When you can’t find baby formula, gas is $5+ per gallon, water supplies are running dry, homeless camps are everywhere and there is no penalty for crime…your government is broken.
The economy is shrinking. Taxes are rising. And people are fleeing. This is the result of broken one-party rule.
There’s a tide turning in California. The policies of one-party rule are failing and the world is watching.

Today, lawmakers sent a letter to the Newsom administration asking to stop the expansion of early release to violent felons. This should be a bi-partisan effort, but not a single Democrat agreed to sign on. What does that say? #SaferCA

Today the Governor is announcing emergency regulations & watering cutbacks for drought.  We passed a Water Bond ten years ago!  What has the Governor done to build more water storage and increase our water supply?  Sites Resevoir project has been on his court for years.

Maryland suspended their 36 cent gas tax. Guess what happened immediately after the law went into effect? Prices at the pump dropped by 36 cents. CA could do the same. But Capitol Democrats are standing in the way of lower gas prices. https://t.co/h1qATYnron
The solution to high gas prices can’t just be ‘buy a Tesla.’ Unfortunately, that was the message sent from the State Capitol from the super majority.

Wow. Every @AsmRepublicans lawmaker voted to take 50 cents off the gallon of gas. Not a single Democrat Assemblymember supported this effort to lower gas prices. #50CentsOffNow https://t.co/2Ty42ZMHt1

It is unfortunately not surprising that Democrats voted down our bill #AB1599 to reform Prop 47 and bring back penalties for theft. It is clear they are not serious about addressing this crime wave affecting our communities.

Newsom’s new “end”demic policy:     1) Continues the hypocritical and nonsensical policy of keeping your kids in masks and 2) refuses to end his emergency powers that allow him to bypass the Legislature and democratic process.

It seems that Newsom realizes that we need to end the masking of our kids in schools and his only delaying to appease special interests like the CTA.  This kind of political chess game where our kids as the pawns has to stop once and for all.

kurdistanMentions.text: The Governor's mandatory water restrictions and new COVID rules for large events are (ironically?) kicking in after September 14th. What else am I missing? Possible school closures? Mandatory energy restrictions or black outs?

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 1 Kurdistan Lens tweet hit for James Gallagher. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2021-08-19T14:03:06Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.

Today, lawmakers sent a letter to the Newsom administration asking to stop the expansion of early release to violent felons. This should be a bi-partisan effort, but not a single Democrat agreed to sign on. What does that say? #SaferCA

Today the Governor is announcing emergency regulations & watering cutbacks for drought.  We passed a Water Bond ten years ago!  What has the Governor done to build more water storage and increase our water supply?  Sites Resevoir project has been on his court for years.

Maryland suspended their 36 cent gas tax. Guess what happened immediately after the law went into effect? Prices at the pump dropped by 36 cents. CA could do the same. But Capitol Democrats are standing in the way of lower gas prices. https://t.co/h1qATYnron

Wow. Every @AsmRepublicans lawmaker voted to take 50 cents off the gallon of gas. Not a single Democrat Assemblymember supported this effort to lower gas prices. #50CentsOffNow https://t.co/2Ty42ZMHt1

It is unfortunately not surprising that Democrats voted down our bill #AB1599 to reform Prop 47 and bring back penalties for theft. It is clear they are not serious about addressing this crime wave affecting our communities.

Newsom’s new “end”demic policy:     1) Continues the hypocritical and nonsensical policy of keeping your kids in masks and 2) refuses to end his emergency powers that allow him to bypass the Legislature and democratic process.

It seems that Newsom realizes that we need to end the masking of our kids in schools and his only delaying to appease special interests like the CTA.  This kind of political chess game where our kids as the pawns has to stop once and for all.
The elites who want to control how you live don’t bother with such limitations in their own life

Gavin was judicious, Garcetti held his breath... C’mon man. Stop. They don’t really believe masking is necessary.  Nor did any one else around them or anyone in that stadium for that matter.  End of story.

John Hopkins meta study determines that lockdowns had “little to no effect on COVID mortality”.  Mandates and shutdowns did not save lives but created substantial harm. This is what many public health experts in academia and private sector had been saying over the past 2 years.
There are very few things that I trust this government to do well. Running a healthcare system for 40 million people is not one of them. Appears there is bi-partisan agreement on this.

Football is a great sport for our youth because it provides teachable moments.  Yesterday’s NFC Championship in LA taught them that the restrictions they have been living under are totally unnecessary and not taken seriously even by those who seek to impose them
Some saying the mental health suffering in the wake of school shutdowns is an argument for government taking over healthcare in CA. This is how out of touch some are in Sacramento.
Happy birthday to my partner in liberty, @KevinKileyCA https://t.co/62ZVYeB9h6

A story that is it not getting nearly enough attention.  There are many public health experts who have disagreed with the approach taken by CA.  Now that the virus has become endemic it is time to lift mandates and restrictions not expand them.  https://t.co/qiL7sP1dSt

Rural schools will ultimately be the hardest hit by this new child vaccine mandate. Enrollment will drastically decline, school district budgets will crumble, and the learning and social losses will be massive. We cannot let this happen.

Anyone who tells you this proposed requirement aligns with historical vaccine protocols is lying to you. The current required vaccinations have for been in use with full FDA approval for decades. The COVID vaccine has not.

I am absolutely going to oppose removing COVID vaccine exemptions for school children. This is wrong and an unconscionable overreach into the family over a virus that poses very minimal threat to young children.

Gavin Newsom and AG Rob Bonta are doing a big presser today on how they are going to combat crime.  No one should take them seriously.  They literally championed the very policies that have led to this crime wave.

A month ago Newsom was touting CA low case rates as proof his strict policies worked.  Now FL has the lowest case rate and our cases are rising.  Does that mean their policies were better?  Or does the virus just naturally lull and surge no matter what your policies are?

I’m not making any judgments at this time but this needs to be fully investigated and accounted for; along with the report of a felon who was arrested with 300 ballots in his possession https://t.co/7J9ZMtVziJ

The Governor's mandatory water restrictions and new COVID rules for large events are (ironically?) kicking in after September 14th. What else am I missing? Possible school closures? Mandatory energy restrictions or black outs?

If you kicked off your anti-recall campaign in San Francisco where all of your failures (housing, homelessness, high cost of living, gentrification, etc.) are on full display.... you might need to be recalled.

I want everyone to understand what the CA Supreme Court passed on:  Newsom changing your election laws overnight to 1) shorten the number of days you can vote; 2) eliminate traditional polling places; 3) eliminate the need for publicly noticed meetings with voting rights groups

Californians expect water to flow when they turn on the faucet. They also expect to see bacon at the grocery store. Government mismanagement and misplaced priorities are jeopardizing both of these expectations.

You want to do something about climate change? Get into the forest & reduce the fuels causing these fires to explode. CA's carbon reduction goals are obliterated year after year. 106 metric tons of carbon emitted in 2020 alone from wildfire! https://t.co/9BDfNsWqOB

In CA we have nearly a 75% vaccination rate combined with millions who have natural immunity from already having contracted the virus.  So why is Gavin Newsom threatening shutdowns and school closures again?

Gavin took in a big donation from a NY hedge fund manager... who probably has the average Californian’s best interest at heart. We have to end the special interests grip on Sacramento.  And one thing is for sure... Gavin Newsom is their guy

The Governor’s actions today show exactly why our lawsuit is so important. The Governor has no intention of giving up one-man rule over CA. @KevinKileyCA and I are headed to the CA Supreme Court soon.

I agree with @KevinKileyCA. The law is on our side and I look forward to arguing on behalf of the People on April 20th in the Court of Appeal. 

https://t.co/pxKJpM7uSs

BREAKING: Appeals Court Sets Date in Gallagher/Kiley v. Newsom. The parties will appear before the 3rd District Court of Appeal in Sacramento on April 20 at 9:30 AM. The lawsuit challenges Newsom’s abuse of emergency powers during the COVID-19 State of Emergency. @KevinKileyCA
Dude you kept the schools closed for months while CDC said it was safe and now you are claiming victory because they might open in April?

I will be opposing the phony ‘school re-opening’ bill today. Even after this bill passes, our children will remain isolated at home staring at a screen for hours on end. I refuse to take part in legitimizing this sham.
You can now officially eat outside... in the rain. But your  school can’t open and you can’t play most sports... but yeah we’re open. 🤦

Sad state of affairs In CA:
•Continues to struggle with vaccine distribution.
•Has stopped providing data justifying the stay at home order.
•Continues a massive backlog of unemployment claims.
•Has made it nearly impossible for schools to re-open.
California Science = Walmart is PACKED, Restaurants are closed.

Did you know that your City government is spending YOUR taxpayer dollars to pay membership dues to an organization (League of CA Cities) which just filed an amicus brief opposing the Gallagher/Kiley lawsuit against Gavin Newsom’s abuse of power?
Another note I received today, "I’ve been a nurse for 25 years and worked in two local hospitals. ICUs running full capacity is something that happens quite routinely, every year."
$80 million for billboards? That’s money our restaurants & other small businesses desperately need.

Government imposed lockdowns do NOT reduce cases or stop spikes. Neither science or reality justify the Governor’s announcement today – just look at how California’s case count compares to less restrictive states.

In Newsom’s CA:
🤦‍♂️ The virus is non-existent in swanky Napa restaurants
🤦‍♂️ Small businesses are dangerous, but big box stores are fine
🤦‍♂️ Expensive private schools can open for the elite, but public schools must remain closed
🤦‍♂️ The virus comes out at night, between 10pm and 5am

Super woke: When you realize that the leaders you have supported & who get you all riled up about inequality are: 1.Super rich  2.Don’t believe those equity rules apply to them. 3.Are actually keeping you where you are
Press release from myself and @KevinKileyCA 👇 https://t.co/1DJL4ijXA0
Judge’s tentative ruling has become final.  Newsom’s order is unconstitutional and he is enjoined from further exercising law making powers!

This was never political; it was never partisan. This ruling will affect whoever is governor, not just this governor, but those in the future. It’s about respecting that balance of power and the fundamental separation of powers that is fundamental to our system of government.
Our trial against Gavin Newsom’s abuses of power has been pushed back an hour to 10am tomorrow. Pray for the restoration of representative government in California.

Fact: @realDonaldTrump may have talked about withholding $ from CA, but he never has. He’s came thru in every disaster. The only person withholding money is Gavin Newsom. He refuses to give Counties their FEDERAL CARES Act $. Where is the outrage?
